title: carex nodosa
intro: Carex nodosa, commonly known as the bladder sedge, is a perennial sedge native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections and reduce inflammation in the body. The health benefits of Carex nodosa include its ability to help manage fluid retention, relieve symptoms of arthritis, and support the immune system. Carex nodosa can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, with the leaves and rhizomes being used for medicinal purposes.
